auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Buttondown API key passed as Authorization: Token <api_key>. Find it on the Buttondown API requests page: https://buttondown.com/requests.

email_address.description: The email address of the subscriber.

notes.description: Any private notes to attach to the subscriber.

metadata.description: A structured key-value blob stored on the Buttondown object.

tags.description: Tag names to apply to the subscriber. Tags that do not already exist will be created.

referrer_url.description: The URL the subscriber was referred from.

utm_campaign.description: The UTM campaign attributed to the subscriber.

utm_medium.description: The UTM medium attributed to the subscriber.

utm_source.description: The UTM source attributed to the subscriber.

anyOf.description: The subscriber lifecycle state returned by Buttondown.
The IP address of the subscriber.

collision_behavior.description: Behavior to apply when a record with the same value exists.

bypass_firewall.description: Whether to bypass Buttondown's firewall for this subscriber creation.

inputSchema.description: The request payload for creating a Buttondown subscriber.

id.description: A unique TypeID associated with the subscriber.

creation_date.description: The date and time at which the subscriber was first created.

email_address.description: The email address of the subscriber.

anyOf.description: The subscriber lifecycle state returned by Buttondown.
Private notes attached to the subscriber.

metadata.description: A structured key-value blob stored on the Buttondown object.

tags.description: Tag names applied to the subscriber.

anyOf.description: URL of the subscriber's avatar image, if available.
The date of the subscriber's most recent bounce event.
When the subscriber cancelled their paid subscription, if applicable.
The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code inferred at signup, if available.
The number of distinct emails delivered to this subscriber.
The subscriber's open count.
The subscriber's clicked count.
The subscriber's open rate, or null when unavailable.
The subscriber's click rate, or null when unavailable.

raw.description: The raw Buttondown API object for advanced fields.

color.description: The hex color code associated with the tag.

anyOf.description: An internal description of the tag.
A public-facing description of the tag.

subscriber_editable.description: Whether subscribers can add or remove this tag from their own profile.

collision_behavior.description: Whether to overwrite an existing tag with the same name.

inputSchema.description: The request payload for creating a Buttondown tag.

actions.name: delete_subscriber
actions.description: Delete a Buttondown subscriber by ID or email address.

id_or_email.description: The Buttondown subscriber ID or email address.
The Buttondown subscriber ID or email address that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the delete request.

actions.name: delete_tag
actions.description: Delete a Buttondown tag by ID.

id.description: The Buttondown tag ID that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the delete request.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get the account associated with the Buttondown API key.

inputSchema.description: The empty input payload for this Buttondown action.

username.description: The username associated with the account.

email_address.description: The email address associated with the account.

actions.name: get_tag

actions.name: list_newsletters
actions.description: List newsletters available to the Buttondown API key.

page.description: The 1-based page number of the paginated response.

page_size.description: The number of results per page.

inputSchema.description: Pagination controls for a Buttondown list request.

id.description: A unique TypeID associated with the newsletter.

creation_date.description: The date and time at which the newsletter was first created.

username.description: The newsletter username, when returned by Buttondown.

name.description: The newsletter name, when returned by Buttondown.

anyOf.description: The newsletter description, when returned by Buttondown.

raw.description: The raw Buttondown API object for advanced fields.

newsletters.description: The newsletters returned for this page.

count.description: The total number of results across all pages.

anyOf.description: The URL to the next page of results, or null when there is no next page.
The URL to the previous page of results, or null when there is no previous page.

actions.name: list_subscribers
actions.description: List Buttondown subscribers with common filters.

page.description: The 1-based page number of the paginated response.

email_address.description: Only return subscribers matching this email fragment.

type.description: The subscriber lifecycle state returned by Buttondown.

tag.description: Only return subscribers matching the given tag names.

date__start.description: Only return subscribers created on or after the given date.

date__end.description: Only return subscribers created before the given date.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination controls for listing Buttondown subscribers.
